app.name: FCE Ultra GX
app.long_description:
- A port of FCE Ultra to the Wii - Use of English as the default UI language - Multi-languages support: Japanese, English, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Dutch, Chinese (Simplified & Traditional), Korean, Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese, Catalan, Turkish, Swedish
Website: https://github.com/duxiuxing/fceugx-cn
